header_01: R&D QUALITY IMPROVEMENT SUGGESTION/ SOLUTION FORM
answer_02: M. Hamann P. Harper, P. Martinez
answer_05: Discontinue coal retention analyses on licensee submitted product samples (Note : Coal Retention testing is not performed by most licensees. Other B&W physical measurements as ends stability and inspection for soft spots in ciparettes are thought to be sufficient measures to assure cigarette physical integrity. The proposed action will increase laboratory productivity . )
answer_06: Delete coal retention from the list of standard analyses performed on licensee submitted product samples. Special requests for coal retention testing could still be submitted on an exception basis.
